nasb.text: You shall cast four gold rings for it and fasten them on its four feet, and two rings shall be on one side of it and two rings on the other side of it.

esv.text: You shall cast four rings of gold for it and put them on its four feet, two rings on the one side of it, and two rings on the other side of it.

cnv.text: 你要鑄造四個金環，安放在櫃的四腳上，兩個環在這邊，兩個環在那邊。

ccb.text: 再造四个金环，安在柜的四个脚上，每边两个环。
